    phone notifications

    Get a buzz on your phone when something needs you — chat mentions, task proposals, agent milestones — even with BonfireOS closed.

    On iPhone or iPad: tap the Share button and choose Add to Home Screen, then open BonfireOS from your home screen and enable this here. Push needs iOS 16.4 or later.
